warnings.message: RPT_18 requires mobile/owner/efficiency rows plus mobile/schedule unique-patient supplement; a single accepted API is not sufficient for full totals closure.
Grouped-header/business-header projection is proven for the RPT_18 family and must not be promoted automatically to unrelated report families.

safe_claim_boundary: For 2026-02-18, RPT_18 is verified via the accepted API composite mobile/owner/efficiency plus mobile/schedule for unique-patient totals, validated against runtime UI. This does not prove that a single API endpoint fully reproduces the report, and the normalization policy remains family-specific.
